channel.title: TTC Service Alerts - Feed Moved
channel.description: This legacy GitHub Pages feed has moved because GitHub did not reliably update every 10 minutes, while Cloudflare Worker serves a more accurate and up-to-date feed.

item.title: Feed Moved: More Accurate Real-Time Updates
item.description: This GitHub Pages feed is retired because GitHub did not reliably update every 10 minutes. Please switch to https://ttc-alerts-rss.liventnick.xyz where the Cloudflare Worker provides more accurate, up-to-date TTC alerts.
